entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: A glimpse of my workplace and my favorite editor where I spend lot of my time currently.

entry.title: Re: Inspection lot not generating for material and Storag...
entry.content:
Hi Herman,

Thanks for your response.

According to your suggestion 

1. "Post to inspection stock" Indicator in place for material in Material master.
2. Checked quality level, There is no skip lot stage because DMR is not assign

The issue is when we post material against the STO (GRN) in with specific storage location that time it is moving stock to unrestricted. Others storage location correctly moving into quality stock.

Akash

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP support portals & processes
entry.content: Hi Karoline.

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP support portals & processes
entry.content: Hi Karoline. It is nice to hear from you. I would like to know more about SAP Learning Hub. Can you give me some more information please?

entry.title: New Member - Introduction
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My name is Ademola Adesokan, and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about myself: I have a strong background as an SAP Associate Consultant with hands-on experience in SAP, particularly in SAP Basis, system administration, and upgrades. I've worked in industries like oil and gas, where I was responsible for managing and optimizing SAP environments to enhance business processes. Additionally, I hold several SAP certifications, including System Administration (HANA) with SAP NetWeaver 7.5, Business Process Integration with SAP S/4HANA, SAP S/4 HANA Conversion and SAP System Upgrade, and SAP Activate Project Manager. In addition, I am also vast in using machine learning/data science approaches to solve problems.

I’m currently working towards my SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the Vower learning group, and I’m looking forward to expanding my knowledge in SAP solutions, especially in business process integration and system optimization.

I’m particularly excited about obtaining this certification because it aligns with my passion for leveraging SAP technologies to solve complex business challenges and drive innovation in enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems. Gaining deeper expertise in SAP S/4HANA Cloud will enable me to further enhance my ability to deliver efficient, scalable solutions for business transformation.

I’m also open to connect with others who are passionate about technology, SAP innovations, and ERP systems, particularly in areas such as business transformation, process improvement, AI, and industries like oil and gas, among many others.

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

Best regards,
Ademola Adesokan

entry.title: Re: Delivery without reference
entry.content: thank you for you answer

    }
}

entry.title: Re: Using RAP Generator, Put Operation fails
entry.content: Were you able to fix it?

entry.title: Re: Will 'Refund Control' = 'Create Credit Memo Request'...
entry.content: We tweaked the BAdI code and now double Approval isn't an issue.

entry.title: From tech sales to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My name is Triphose Etienne, and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about myself: 

I am a results-driven professional with a strong background in business development, tech sales, and CRM management, now transitioning into a career as an SAP consultant. I have experience in managing full sales cycles, strategic lead generation, and nurturing client relationships, and I’m eager to apply these skills to SAP S/4HANA implementations and process optimizations.

Having worked extensively with CRM platforms like Salesforce and Hubspot, I am highly proficient in managing and tracking client data, a crucial aspect for success in the SAP ecosystem. My experience includes analyzing client requirements, recommending tailored solutions, and ensuring smooth project delivery, which aligns perfectly with the Fit-to-Standard approach in SAP consulting.

In addition, I bring project management experience and a strong understanding of how to collaborate cross-functionally to meet key business objectives. 

I am excited to help organizations maximize the value of their SAP investments, streamline their processes, and achieve seamless digital transformations. I am particularly interested in working on SAP implementations, system configurations, and process integrations that drive measurable improvements for businesses.

I’m passionate about learning new technologies and look forward to applying my skills in a more technical environment, helping businesses implement and fully leverage the power of SAP systems.

I recently completed my training for SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the Vower learning group, and I’m really looking forward to expanding my knowledge in SAP implementation roles in supply chain management, or finance.

I’m particularly excited about obtaining this certification because of my passion for technology.

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

 

Best regards,  

Triphose S. Etienne

entry.title: Re: Error: update-rc.d: error: unkown option
entry.content: SAP Notes for further information: SAP Note 2369910 and SAP Note 2235581

entry.title: Re: For STO POin S4, in Me21n,Not possible to determine s...
entry.content:
Hello @Sandy8 

See SAP Help page about missing shipping data Shipping tab not appears or Error 06280 or 06855 “Not possible to determine shipping…” comes during STO creation

Regarding missing customer data - a customer is assigned to a plant in SPRO Materials Management -> Purchasing -> Purchase Order -> Set up Stock Transport Order -> Define Shipping Data for Plants

Technically, the customer assigned to a plant is stored in T001W-KUNNR.

It looks like in your case the customer 2102 is assigned to the plant NZE3, but the customer master data is not created. You either need to assign a correct customer number to the plant or create missing customer master data.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: CO11N Confirmation type (Final) not defaulting
entry.content:
Greetings,

you can try customizing single screen entry for production orders by following the SPRO path:

Production -> Shop Floor Control -> Operations -> Confirmation -> Single Screen Entry -> Define Single-Screen Entry for Confirming Production Orders

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: If 261 is not done for all components, 101 should not be allowed
entry.content: Why would you want to implement such a restriction? If there are technical problems with posting 261, you won't be able to post 101 receipt of the product. Thus you will restrict the product availability and jeopardize customer service level.

entry.title: Re: CO11N Confirmation type (Final) not defaulting
entry.content:
Greetings,

you can try customizing single screen entry for production orders by following the SPRO path:

Production -> Shop Floor Control -> Operations -> Confirmation -> Single Screen Entry -> Define Single-Screen Entry for Confirming Production Orders

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: Can a MRP generate schedule lines automtically at tim...
entry.content:
Hello @RanjithKumarM 

I don't think so. MRP runs on daily basis, it plans in daily buckets.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: CO11N Confirmation type (Final) not defaulting
entry.content:
Greetings,

you can try customizing single screen entry for production orders by following the SPRO path:

Production -> Shop Floor Control -> Operations -> Confirmation -> Single Screen Entry -> Define Single-Screen Entry for Confirming Production Orders

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Joining the band
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am Jérôme-Laurent Noguez from France.
I have been a SAP user during 24 years, mainly P2P modules.
during the last years as end-user, I also had a core user role, participating in tests for enhancements and new tools created by the Enterprise Effectiveness entity of the  the group I work for. Then I definitely joined EE a year ago, as Business Process Analyst.
I am here to learn, understand, brig a bit of support based on my user experience and benefit from technicians knowledge.

entry.title: Re: Wave Creation is not possible with Activity area cond...
entry.content:
Hi,

"The rough bin determination is set at the level of the storage type and the warehouse process type but still not working."

Does the rough bin determination work? Do you see the source bin in the warehouse request / PDO? And I believe it also should then show the activity area.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning BPC live model - Publish data from the s...
entry.content: Thank you Savio for your answer. But I use a BPC connection from SAC and the BPC planning sequence is executed directly. The procedure would likely work, but I don't want to increase the user's waiting time. With the refresh in the script, it works fine. However, my concern is that there might be a slight delay, possibly just a second, during which the system doesn't recognize that the data has changed, causing the SAC script to report that there's no data to save. When I include the refresh, it correctly detects the change and saves the data.

entry.title: Re: Merge feature branch to MAIN branch in gCTS fiori app
entry.content:
Hi Sunil,

first of all: I assume that Developer1 and Developer 2 use their own development systems, right? It is not possible to work on the same object in one system on two different versions. Only one version of an ABAP object can be active in a system at a time and therefore, it is only possible to work on that one version.

So under the assumption that each developer works on his own system in his own branch: there is no need to do the merge on GitHub. the gCTS FioriApp supports you with merging and solving conflicts. How the merge can be done is described in here: https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/4a368c163b08418890a406d413933ba7/de66bedd91ba469dab6f28dc60abcb05.html

Please note that merges are always done into the active branch. Therefore, developer needs to activate the main branch and then merge his branch into the main branch. If another developer did a merge before, conflicts might come up that cannot be resolved automatically. These need to be resolved before the merge finishes. After the merge, the developer can switch back to a development branch.

Kind regards
Karin

entry.title: Re: Asset Revaluation & Acquisition in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition via SAP Build Process Au
entry.content:
Hi @Hardeep_Tulsi , great blog!

If we want to just post asset revaluation in bulk, then SAP Build Apps would be sufficient. Am I correct? Where will the build app be hosted?

How to consume business accelerator hub available ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Infotype 0001An exception with the type CX_SY_DYN_CALL_ILLEGAL_TYPE occurred, but was neither handle
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am currently implementing BIB replication (EC to ERP)

However while testing the replication is error out.

Currently testing for existing employees.

Infotype 0001An exception with the type CX_SY_DYN_CALL_ILLEGAL_TYPE occurred, but was neither handled locally, nor declared in a RAISING clause

Message no. ECPAO_IN_PROCESSING055

Pernr XXXXXXXX : Infotype 0001 with error.

Message no. ECPAO_IN_PROCESSING077

Can any one provide a resolution.

I additionally checked below notes, however existing feature for VSKSI is PME25

https://me.sap.com/notes/3276951/E

https://me.sap.com/notes/3464874/E

Thanks

What error do you get when you try to migrate the materials?

Gitte.

entry.title: Create Inbound Deliveries in EWM Using an ABAP Program (Save Inbound Delivery Replica)
entry.content:
Recently, I encountered a requirement where Purchase Order data was being sourced from a non-SAP ERP system. This data was stored in our custom Z tables within the EWM system. The goal was to enable warehouse users to create inbound delivery replicas using RF devices or a front-end transaction in a decentralized EWM environment.

As a novice in EWM system development, I was unsure about the most efficient way to accomplish this task. Therefore, I will begin by outlining my approach and the solution I discovered.

There are two standard ways I could create Inbound Delivery in EWM:

  1. Transaction: /SCWM/PRDI
  2. Standard Inbound IDoc: SHP_IBDLV_SAVE_REPLICA

Creating the delivery using the transaction was not feasible, as it didn’t align with the user’s needs. An IDoc was the only option for automating the delivery creation process. However, using an IDoc would require either triggering it via a file or establishing outbound and inbound partner profiles for my system, followed by externally triggering the outbound IDoc from my ABAP program.

  1. Debugging /SCWM/PRDI transaction: Debugging this transaction felt too complex and time-consuming, so I skipped this and went ahead with debugging IDoc function module 
  2. Testing and debugging IDoc (SHP_IBDLV_SAVE_REPLICA): The delivery was successfully created using the WE19 IDoc test transaction. I further proceeded to debug the IDoc function module. During this process, I identified a class that was utilized for creating inbound
    • Class: /scwm/cl_mapin_id_savereplica

While analyzing the function group for the IDoc function module, I discovered another function module within the same group.

/SCWM/INB_DLV_SAVEREPLICA: This function module, also creates EWM Inbound Deliveries using the same class and methods as the IDoc. Therefore, I decided to investigate whether I could utilize this function module in my ABAP program to create inbound deliveries. As an additional note, this function module is also used to replicate Inbound Deliveries from SAP ERP systems using RFCs.

After a few trials and resolving quite a few errors, I discovered that this function module required qRFC to successfully create inbound deliveries. Invoking it without qRFC would result in an ABAP runtime error or dump.

Following this, I have included an example program that demonstrates the use of the function module for creating inbound deliveries.

 

Create EWM inbound delivery replica using FM: /SCWM/INB_DLV_SAVEREPLICA

The following demo program illustrates how to create outbound and inbound queues using ABAP qRFC APIs and invoke the function as an RFC in a separate task.

Note: You must have an SM59 ABAP destination configured for your EWM system.

Program:

 

 

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Report ZTEST_INBOUND_DELIVERY
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
REPORT ZTEST_INBOUND_DELIVERY.

DATA: lt_header_partner          TYPE /scwm/tt_header_partner,
      lt_header_deadlines        TYPE /scwm/tt_header_deadlines,
      lt_item_data               TYPE /scwm/tt_inb_item_data,
      lt_item_org                TYPE /scwm/tt_inb_item_org,
      lt_item_ref_purchase_order TYPE /scwm/tt_item_ref_prchse_order.


*Creating work areas.
DATA: ls_header_data   TYPE /scwm/bapiibdlvhdr,
      ls_header_org    TYPE /scwm/bapiibdlvhdrorg,
      lv_sender_system TYPE tbdls-logsys,
      ls_techn_control TYPE /scwm/bapidlvcontrol.

DATA: lv_matnr TYPE matnr VALUE '1'.



DATA: lv_idoc_status TYPE bdidocstat-status,
      lv_deliv_numb  TYPE vbeln_vl VALUE '4630900042'.


"Set Data into Import Parameters
ls_header_data = VALUE #( deliv_numb   = lv_deliv_numb
                          billoflading = 'TESTBOL'
                          extdelv_no   = |DEL_{ sy-datum }_{ sy-timlo }UTC|
                          dlv_type     = 'EL'
                          sd_doc_cat   = '7' ).

ls_header_org = VALUE #( ship_point = '0001'
                         whse_no    = 'W01' ).

lv_sender_system = 'NONSAP_ERP'.        "Define as Non-SAP ERP in SPRO configs

ls_techn_control = VALUE #( upd_ind        = 'I'
                            recv_whs_no    = 'W01'
                            recv_sys       = 'EWDCLNT100'
                            dlv_type       = 'EL'
                            internal_queue = abap_true ).

lt_header_partner = VALUE #( ( deliv_numb = lv_deliv_numb
                               itm_number = '000010'
                               partner_no = 'WH01VEN' ) ).

lt_header_deadlines = VALUE #( ( deliv_numb    = lv_deliv_numb
                                 timetype      = 'WSHDRLFDAT'
                                 timestamp_utc = '20240920150000'
                                 timezone      = 'UTC' ) ).

lt_item_data = VALUE #( ( deliv_numb        = lv_deliv_numb
                          itm_number        = '000010'
                          material          = |{ lv_matnr ALPHA = IN }|
                          dlv_qty           = '5.000'
                          sales_unit_iso    = 'EA'
                          sales_unit        = 'EA'
                          dlv_qty_stock     = '5.000'
                          base_uom          = 'EA'
                          base_uom_iso      = 'EA'
                          conv_unit_nom     = '1'
                          conv_unit_denom   = '1'
                          rec_point         = '0001'
                          item_categ        = 'ELN'
                          whse_mvmt         = '101'
                          move_type         = '101'
                          move_type_wm      = '101'
                          material_external = '1'
                          prod_date         = sy-datum ) ).

lt_item_org = VALUE #( ( deliv_numb = lv_deliv_numb
                         itm_number = '000010'
                         plant      = 'WH01'
                         stge_loc   = 'WH01' ) ).

lt_item_ref_purchase_order = VALUE #( ( deliv_numb     = lv_deliv_numb
                                        itm_number     = '000010'
                                        doc_number     = '4500000001'
                                        itm_number_ref = '00010'
                                        sd_doc_cat     = 'V'
                                        doc_cat        = 'F'
                                        doc_type       = 'NB'
                                        status         = '9'
                                        pur_group      = '001'
                                        doc_date       = '20240911'
                                        gr_ind         = 'X'
                                        gr_basediv     = 'X' ) ).

DATA: lv_deliv TYPE vbeln.

CONSTANTS: lc_queue_name      TYPE trfcqout-qname VALUE 'TEST_QUEUE_EWM_1',
           lc_queue_name_in   TYPE trfcqout-qname VALUE 'TEST_QUEUE_EWM_2',
           lc_ewd_destination TYPE rfcdes-rfcdest VALUE 'EWD'.


"Set Queue Name for the next qRFC-call
CALL FUNCTION 'TRFC_SET_QUEUE_NAME'
  EXPORTING
    qname              = lc_queue_name
  EXCEPTIONS
    invalid_queue_name = 1
    OTHERS             = 2.
IF sy-subrc = 0.

  CALL FUNCTION 'TRFC_SET_QIN_PROPERTIES'
    EXPORTING
      qin_name           = lc_queue_name_in
      qout_name          = lc_queue_name
    EXCEPTIONS
      invalid_queue_name = 1
      error_message      = 2
      OTHERS             = 3.
  IF sy-subrc = 0.

    CALL FUNCTION '/SCWM/INB_DLV_SAVEREPLICA'
      IN BACKGROUND TASK
      AS SEPARATE UNIT
      DESTINATION lc_ewd_destination
      EXPORTING
        techn_control           = ls_techn_control
        header_data             = ls_header_data
        header_org              = ls_header_org
        sender_system           = lv_sender_system
      TABLES
        header_partner          = lt_header_partner
        header_deadlines        = lt_header_deadlines
        item_data               = lt_item_data
        item_org                = lt_item_org
        item_ref_purchase_order = lt_item_ref_purchase_order.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      ROLLBACK WORK.
    ELSE.
      COMMIT WORK.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.
ENDIF.

WRITE: |Execution complete for queue|.

"As the FM does not return Delivery Number,
" we can wait and fetch the delivery from table
"  using PO number as refernce
WAIT UP TO 5 SECONDS.
SELECT docno AS delivery
      FROM /scdl/db_proch_i AS a
      INNER JOIN /scdl/db_refdoc AS b
      ON a~docid = b~docid
      WHERE b~refdoccat = 'IDR'
        AND b~doccat = 'PDI'
        AND b~refbskey = 'NONSAP_ERP'
        AND b~refdocno = _deliv_numb
        INTO TABLE (lt_inb_deliv).
IF sy-subrc = 0.
  WRITE: |Delivery created Successfully|.
  cl_demo_output=>display( lt_inb_deliv ).
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: How to get list all data in Tcode CKMLQS
entry.content: Edited. Thankyou so much !!!

entry.title: Re: Smart Forms not printing on Zebra ZT231 Printer
entry.content: If your question is about why not getting any spool (nothing in SP01?) while printing to YZB300U, did you debug YCL_PDL_IMP_ZB_YZB1 (I guess it's the PDL driver behind YZB300U), what happens?

entry.title: Re: Need to create PYSM story but with selection on month
entry.content: Have you tried to create a restricted measure with navigation to previous year?

entry.title: Flexibility Services LrepConnector doesn't seem to work
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I am trying to deploy a Fiori Elements application in SAP BTP in the Fiori Launchpad or Work Zone, however I am unable to obtain the Flexibility Changes from the LrepConnector. I have already configured it in the index.html, added FlexEnabled = true and in the libraries I incorporated the sap.ui.fl, added a route in the xs-app.json, however I am unable to consume the flexibility changes even though the sap/bc/lrep service is active in the backend.

Thank you very much for your support

entry.title: Re: Need to copy PR nr after creation
entry.content:
Hello @AKoleva 

Go to SAP GUI settings:

then go to Notifications node and mark the message types that should be displayed in a dialog box:

That will display messages as dialog boxes giving you ample time to copy.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Merge feature branch to MAIN branch in gCTS fiori app
entry.content:
Hi @Karin ,

Thank you very much for your reply.

Developer 1 and Developer 2 are working in the same development system on a single Z object. In classical approach, as both developers simultaneously can have their own tasks in the main transport request number on the same object, how to map the same scenario using gCTS? So only MAIN branch to remain active in Developer 1's and Developer 2's gCTS apps? Branching is not applicable for this case?  Kindly advise

 

Regards,

Sunil

entry.title: Re: Seeking Clarification on Clean Core Strategy for New ABAP Custom Code on BTP ABAP vs ECC
entry.content: Side note: S/4HANA Private Cloud alone doesn't imply a clean core strategy. You might still adopt the old "dirty" approach.

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning BPC live model - Publish data from the s...
entry.content: "Great observation, Rubén! I've encountered similar issues when working with SAC and BPC models. Adding a refresh step definitely helps sync the data correctly before publishing. Another option could be to check the processing times between sequences and data saves to ensure everything aligns. Would love to hear if others have found alternative solutions!"

entry.title: Re: How to get list all data in Tcode CKMLQS
entry.content: People usually run the SQL trace (ST05) to identify the tables and deduce the logic (reverse engineer) how to join the data all together (possibly, an ABAP developer may look at the code if needed).

entry.title: Re: Create Inbound Deliveries in EWM Using an ABAP Program (Save Inbound Delivery Replica)
entry.content:
That is a very nice article.

One point I don't understand why you are using qRFC to process /SCWM/INB_DLV_SAVEREPLICA. That makes /SCWM/INB_DLV_SAVEREPLICA execution asynchronous. But later on, you wait for the queue to execute to get the inbound delivery number. 

Why don't you just execute /SCWM/INB_DLV_SAVEREPLICA synchronously and get the inbound delivery number directly from the function's exporting parameter DELIVERY:

FUNCTION /scwm/inb_dlv_savereplica.
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Local Interface:
*"  IMPORTING
*"     VALUE(HEADER_DATA) LIKE  /SCWM/BAPIIBDLVHDR STRUCTURE
*"        /SCWM/BAPIIBDLVHDR
*"     VALUE(HEADER_ORG) LIKE  /SCWM/BAPIIBDLVHDRORG STRUCTURE
*"        /SCWM/BAPIIBDLVHDRORG
*"     VALUE(SENDER_SYSTEM) LIKE  TBDLS-LOGSYS
*"     VALUE(TECHN_CONTROL) LIKE  /SCWM/BAPIDLVCONTROL STRUCTURE
*"        /SCWM/BAPIDLVCONTROL OPTIONAL
*"     VALUE(HEADER_DATA_SPL) LIKE  /SCWM/SPE_BAPIIBDLVHDR STRUCTURE
*"        /SCWM/SPE_BAPIIBDLVHDR
*"     VALUE(MAX_ITEM_NUMB) TYPE  /SCWM/DE_SPE_MAX_POSNR OPTIONAL
*"     VALUE(UPD_TASK_ENQ_TOKEN) TYPE  GUID_16 OPTIONAL
*"  EXPORTING
*"     VALUE(DELIVERY) TYPE  VBELN "<--- delivery number is returned here
*"  TABLES
*"      HEADER_PARTNER STRUCTURE  /SCWM/BAPIDLVPARTNER
*"      HEADER_PARTNER_ADDR STRUCTURE  BAPIADDR1 OPTIONAL
*"      HEADER_DEADLINES STRUCTURE  /SCWM/BAPIDLVDEADLN

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: This is it:

entry.title: Re: BW/4HANA Task Chain Log Table
entry.content:
Hi,

You also can use transaction RSPCM to get an overview of all process chains with status. From here you can jump into the process chain for more analysis.

Best Regards,

Eduard

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
Integration Suite – SF Principal Propagation: Error Retrieval of OAuthToken
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We want to try Principal Propagation to SuccessFactors in Integration Suites so we can perform SuccessFactors approval (SF API approveWfRequest and rejectWfRequest) from external system (mobile apps)—that needs to be executed using the actual approver’s user ID.

 

We have followed the steps to configured the Principal Propagation in this blog: Principal Propagation in SAP Integration Suite from external system to SuccessFactors, however we still got error :

ErrorCode :200 ErrorMessage :Retrieval of OAuthToken failed due to: Cannot determine user to propagate for OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion destination. Either provide user_token JWT token (https://docs.cloudfoundry.org/api/uaa/version/4.7.1/index.html#user-token-grant) when retrieving the destination or configure it with SystemUser..)

 

 

Following are our configurations in BTP, SF, and Integration Suites.

 

Role Collection in BTP with 2 users that have account in SF:

 

 

OAuth configuration in SF using Certificate downloaded from BTP Destination:

 

 

Security Material created in Integration Suites using Client Key from ZOAUTH_IS_2 API Key.

 

 

And lastly, this is our integration flow and how we call it using Postman (with user configured in role collection SF_Propagation):

 

 

 

 

 

 

Is there anything wrong with our configuration? Or there is missing configuration that we need to execute?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Idea for improvement: Filter for this year's past Devtoberfest events in List view
entry.content:
Hey,

as of now if somebody wants to check the past events of this year's Devtoberfest in the list view on the events page (https://community.sap.com/t5/devtoberfest/eb-p/devtoberfest-events) by selecting the Event status "Past" the results are past events since 2022. It would be great to have another filter for the event year, because I assume that people are mainly interested in the content of the current year.

Just an idea for improvement to not let people scroll through several dozens events. 

Best regards,

Marcel

entry.title: Re: Create Inbound Deliveries in EWM Using an ABAP Program (Save Inbound Delivery Replica)
entry.content: Hi @DominikTylczyn , This function is designed for asynchronous execution and will give an exception if executed without queues. From what I learned, I understand that this function is used for replicating inbound deliveries in EWM from SAP ERP and hence the SAP might've added some validations to ensure the data consistency. Additionally, if you look inside the code of the function module, the variable for inbound delivery is not assigned the value anywhere. So, even if you could execute it synchronously in the same process, you won't get a delivery number.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: Nothing special, Fiori and Floorplan Manager for Web Dynpro ABAP are my favorites

entry.title: Missing External Transactions in Transaction Type
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Greetings of the day!

We are facing challenges while uploading the MT940 bank statement.

The Transaction Type 33MT (MT940 (SWIFT) United Arab Emirates) does not include the following external transaction.

NTRF    Bank Transfer
NVAT    VALUE ADDED TAX - OUTPUT
NCHG    Bank Charges
NLDP    LOAN RECOVERY

Thanks & Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Missing External Transactions in Transaction Type
entry.content: Thanks for the information provided. Please create the external transactions in SSCUI 101024 - "Make Global Settings for Electronic Bank Statement" based on your own business scenario.

entry.title: How to separate parent production orders for each child production lot.
entry.content:
Hello. 
I have a question about production orders.

 

I want to separate the parent manufacturing order for each child manufacturing lot. From a traceability perspective, we know that we can check the lots of child components used in the lot cockpit, but in the semiconductor sector we want to separate manufacturing orders by component.

For example, is it possible to separate a manufacturing order for 100 A into an order for 60 units based on lot 001 and an order for 40 units based on lot 002?　

Parent product A, child product B.
To produce one unit of A, one unit of B is required.

100 units of A are required.
Split B → 60 units, 40 units.
(60 units = lot number 001, 40 units = lot number 002)

In such a case, is there a way to split the production order for A into two parts?
Or does it remain as one?
For example.
The production order for product A is 60 units (lot number 001).
The production order for product A is for 40 units (lot no. 002), etc.

I would appreciate it if someone could tell me how to do this and whether it is possible!

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAP FIORI Tools - Application Modeler
entry.content: We might need more information to help you. What error message, what versions etc.

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit internal numbering
Re: Migration Cockpit internal numbering
entry.content: I wanted the material to use internal numbering, i found out that after all it was a problem with MMNR, but figured it out. What i need though is a way in which the customer can insert the material number from their source system and the migration cockpit to make it internal. For example: if the customer has 2 materials, FG100 and SG100, with the migration i want the customer to fill a field in the template (ex legacy material number) with FG100 which will correspond to material 60000001 after the migration, and the same thing for the semifinished material. The customer will fill SG100 and after the migration with the internal numbering it will be 30000001 , etc.

entry.title: SAP BTP Partner Hands-on Excellence Program (HEP) Workshop Catalog
entry.content:
Introducing the SAP BTP Partner Hands-On Excellence Program (HEP) Catalog 2024 / 2025 featuring the following topics. To bring you top content and key insights, we cover the hottest core topics of SAP Business Technology Platform in 2 or 3 day workshops. Our workshops are available on-site and in-person across several different locations.

We have dates available for the following topics: 

  • SAP Datasphere
  • SAP Build
  • SAP Integration Suite
  • SAP Business AI

Our workshops are expanding! We are excited to cover even more topics in the coming months. Stay tuned for our workshop dates featuring:

  • SAP Fiori E2E
  • SAP Mobile Experience
  • SAP Build Code

What is in it for you?

  • On-site events for full focus and participation
  • Direct access to topic experts. Get your questions answered and grow your network
  • Elevate your skills as you learn and explore the benefits of SAP Discovery Center as an enablement platform from upskilling to go-live.
  • Make your voice heard by sharing your feedback on the workshop and products
  • Receive your digital badge after successfully completing the workshop

entry.title: Breaking Out of Comfort Zones: The Learning Journey of Danielle Larocca
entry.content:
There is no doubt that the way we learn today has changed – dramatically. “I remember what it was like to attend SAP training classes back in the late 90’s”, Danielle Larocca recounts, “back then they were hosted onsite only and you would get paper-based certificates via a small ceremony each time.”  

It was 1995, and for Danielle, her SAP HCM and Payroll reporting experience was just about to start. She was working for Doubleday Direct, which later became a Bertelsmann AG and AOL Time Warner Partnership in Garden City, New York. The company had decided to implement SAP amidst fears that their legacy payroll system would cease functioning in the Y2K era. And as part of the implementation project, she was sent off for ABAP/4 training.  

Learning all about AI

Today, the learning experience looks very different for the global VP for Strategic Alliances. “Over the past several months, I have been dedicating my educational hours to all things AI.” What else would it be in the year 2024? The SAP Mentor started writing a series of blogs, ranging from AI-generated headshots, to functional video avatars and video language conversions. Her work – and learning experience – has become way more digital, fast-paced, and versatile compared to previous decades. “I have even let AI write a blog post for me and make a ppt for me", she highlights. “I also make an effort to share a weekly #AI Byte on LinkedIn that shares with others some key topics on AI that should be on their radar.” No doubt that the way she learns and the topics she learns about have changed.  

But there is more to is, says Danielle: “My life has changed in the sense that I have gone outside my comfort zone.” Moving away from HCM, Payroll, and reporting – her familiar turf – Danielle started to learn about technologies outside of her world, “to expand my horizon on the art of the possible with what technology can do.” Her latest achievement: The “Introducing SAP Business AI Commercial Model” learning journey on SAP Learning site, which rewarded her with an official record of achievement to demonstrate her expertise. 

Adapting to changing technologies is important

However, Danielle admits that learning a new skill sometimes comes with a small damper: “It is hard to A) carve out the time and B) learn something new but it is rewarding and exciting to be in the loop on the latest technological advancements that will transform our everyday lives.” As we get older, she states, “it's easy to settle into our homeostasis of what we know and what we are experts on and it's easy to stay in that comfort zone, but it does not allow for personal growth.” According to Danielle, we all must adapt and learn new things to survive and thrive, especially in an ever-changing technological evolution climate.   

“With all that said I have carved out time from my very busy schedule to learn something new each week.  I call it my education hours and they usually fall on a Sunday night.  I am committed to learning something new for 2 hours every week that is outside the scope of my day-to-day life and it involves some form of cutting-edge tech, for me its AI.” 

How do you learn? Share!

How do you tackle learning a new skill? Let us know about your strategy in the comments and start your next chapter of boosting your career with future-focused learning on the SAP Learning site today.

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇹 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Vienna, Austria)
entry.content: As I'm travelling to Vienna by plane, and land at 8:40 so I expect to be onsite at 10:00. Will it be enough or do I need to be earlier?

entry.title: Re: Check compatibility pack usage in SAP S/4HANA with SAP EarlyWatch Alert
entry.content:
Hi Marcel,

the link is already available. It leads to the app "Solution Finder" and you can access it with an S-User, which has the authorization "Service Reports and Feedback". 

Best regards,

Susanne

entry.title: About users with profile SAP_ALL
entry.content:
Dear experts

The EWA report points out the number of users with profile [SAP_ALL].
There are three challenges to solving this problem.

1.
Is it correct that having the profile SAP_ALL is not recommended? Should it not be allowed to have even if it reduces the number of users to a minimum?

2.
The EWA report shows the number of active users as 34. I specified SAP_ALL and S_A.system in table UST04. The output result is 26.
What is the difference?

3.
According to SAP Note 2894909, it will be fixed in release version 01V* of component ST-A/PI.
This environment is 01V_731(sp0002).
Please tell us how to solve it.

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024

entry.title: Re: For STO POin S4, in Me21n,Not possible to determine s...
entry.content:
Hi 

It shows that there is issue with customer master data. 

Please check all setting customer master data has been created correctly. extended to correct sales organization and assigned correct plant to it 

See thread it may help you 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/customer-xxxx-does-not-exist-please-change-entry-in-plant-xxxx/qaq-p/5558936

 

If shipping tab is not coming so you need to check all setting once again with correct data. Also define shipping data with correct sale organization and customer master data.

Hope it will help you 

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: FSM - Restore of Backup limited to 1 GB
entry.content:
The max size of a backup is 1 GB. 

The backup size is more than 1 GB. 

A restore does not work.

How to deal in case of systems copied from production to test?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: FSM - Restore of Backup limited to 1 GB
entry.content:
The backup and restore feature via download and upload has a 1 GB size limitation which is the old approach. Customers can also restore the backup via the share function which is the new approach. Please check the following page for more details: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIELD_SERVICE_MANAGEMENT/fsm_admin/backup_restore.html

This will allow you to restore the backup with a size more than 1 GB

entry.title: Re: CPI: API has restriction to pull only 100 records in each call
entry.content:
So it's only 2 hours of run, questions are:

 

1) this API give you possibility to ask $top and $skip (paging) so you can work with sequentials runs?

2) How much time to finish your processing with 100 records?

3) In this "absurd" case 🙂I could create a little flow that take 100 and finish, local variable with $skip.

4) Do you know how many records are recorded when you start to pick them?

5) These records are contínuos changing/updating/growing?

example steps:

After your answers this flow could be different.

Can someone please help me here. I would like to know how can I check if the catalog role is assigned to my user. What is the t code for the same. Ekta

Yesterday, I used the Application Generator and it worked. Today, I tried again, and nothing happened. I checked the last update of the SAP Fiori Tools—Extension Pack extension, and it says it was last updated today. I think a newer version caused this issue.

entry.title: Re: Inspection lot not generating for material and Storag...
entry.content: Hi Akah, Is you receiving storage location IM / WM / EWM managed. As it is EWM managed than it could be that the inspection rule is not setup for the sending party.

entry.title: Re: SAP CUSTOMER CHECKOUT MANAGER ARTICLES UPDATE FROM SA...
entry.content:
Hallo Mélissa

First of all you are using a very old version of SAP Customer Checkout.
The latest version is Feature Pack 20.

If you are connected with SAP BusinessOne and sync your article from SAP BusinessOne in SAP Customer Checkout then the articles in SAP Customer Checkout manager plays no role. The articles are automatically created when a receipt is posted in SAP Customer Checkout manager. These articles are created just to satisfy some database dependency. They are not updated after that. Also only those articles gets created when are part of any receipt. Others articles are never created.
Hence no updates are happening. If you need to update them for any reporting reasons, then manual update or update using our API needs to be done by you.

Hope it helps.

If your question in answered correctly, kindly select the answer as "Right Answer". This helps others to follow and easily locate answers.

Best Regards,
Bikash Bansal
Product Owner, SAP Customer Checkout

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Transactional Data Upload
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

Need help with a query regarding transactional data upload in SAC. So I have uploaded the data into my model where the account dimension along with a number of other dimensions are mapped to unassigned. Now the problem is that the import is successful, data is uploaded and I can see it in the data foundation view but not in the stories and data analyzer. If I select all the same filters, even then I can't see the data. 

Any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: SAP TRM: Separation of loan principal and interest pa...
entry.content:
Hi, Tobias,

The flows from principal and interest are using different flow types and update types, and should not be posted into same GL Account.

If this is not the case in your tenant, I would suggest you to raise an OSS message so that our colleague could further check the configuration in your system to guide you to achieve that.

Would it be ok for you?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Yard Management and SAP Yard Logistics Deployment Options – embedded vs. side-by-side
entry.content:
Hello @SB_FKD , 

The stated functional limitation is targeting the possible deployment restrictions as for SAP Yard Logistics 2.0 (SAP YL 2.0) an underlying SAP EWM system is required, while starting with SAP Yard Logistics 1807 you can have a standalone deployment.

This you can check in the Product Availability Matrix: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/pam?hash=s%3DSAP%2520Yard%2520Logistics%26o%3Dmost_viewed%257Cdesc%26st%3Dl%26rpp%3D20%26page%3D1%26pvnr%3D73555000100900001086%26pt%3Dg%257Cr 

Additionally, the dependency to SAP EWM requires a special, but simplified setup of a technical warehouse number and its related layout. This need not to be confused with the linked warehousing processes that runs on independent EWM business systems used for the EWM-related processes. 

I recommend checking the official master guide for SAP YL 2.0, which explains the dependency and functional limitation in more detail: https://uacp2.hana.ondemand.com/doc/8e037010246e4fb3bf6eee143181b58a/2.0/en-US/MG_YL_200.pdf 

To answer the question about the necessity of the PI it is required to know the targeted integration and business scenario.

Regards,
Thomas

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024

Hi,

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Hybrid Connector - Classic vs New Product co...
entry.content: Hi Vasanth,

entry.title: SAP CPI--> S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,

I'm new to S4 HANA integrations. I want to upload exchange rate data from an API into a table in SAP S/4 HANA via SAP CPI. My question is how can we setup connectivity with S/4 HANA and post the data to that particular TCURR table. Also, which receiver adapter is best suited for this scenario. 

Kindly help with your inputs.

Thank you,

Sri

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Hybrid Connector - Classic vs New Product co...
entry.content:
Hi Vasanth,

thanks for your question.

Please see below the answer from 3E:

1. Question : Will this Hybrid connector enable us to transfer the classic DG master data to Advanced DG Basic/Enclosure specific classification and can it be enhanced from there ? or How exactly should we maintain the DG data whether in classic DG or new DG solution or else in both DG areas from DG specialist perspective ?

Answer: The Hybrid adapter transfers Basic DG classification from Classic to New, it does not transfer packaging specific data. The idea is to do the basic DG classification in Classic (automatic or manually) and transfer it once it is saved to New. In New the packaging data can be added, and all further DG Management can be done in New.

2. Question will this connector allow us to transfer the Advanced New S/4 DG data to Classic Product safety section 14 information ?

Answer: The 3E Hybrid adapter can currently not transfer DG data from New to Classic due to different data models. We are evaluating if there is a possibility to print section 14 data from New in the WWI report in Classic.

In case of further questions concerning the 3E Hybrid Adapter please contact us at info@3eco.com.

Thanks

Ulrike

I am using "SAP_COMM_0531" communication arrangement.

entry.title: Material With Sub-Material without Subcontracting for New Purchase
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Scenario: A business captures bundled materials as finished goods for procurement. The finished good (bundle) consists of several sub-items that need to be recorded under the main material, with the total cost of the bundle reflected in the purchase order header.

Note: It’s not a part of subcontracting.

Material

Cost

GST

Tyre assemble with sub material

15000

18%

Sub Materials – Tyre

Sub Materials – Tube

Sub Materials – Flap

 

 

10000

2500

2500

18%

18%

18%

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create the GL account groups in the CBC
entry.content: Hi Owen, It is not allowing to create the account group start with Y like YINT.

entry.title: Re: Payment Processing tab in Purchase Order
entry.content:
You dont find the Payment processing tab in ME21N despite LOG_MMFI_P2P being active most likely because the Down payment is supressed in OLME > Purchase order > Define Screen Layout at Document Level

Activate it for ME21N, ME22N, NBF, PT0F (Standard item purchase order), etc.

Selection group GR/IR control

Second check box from the bottom.

entry.title: How to send txt file to Non- SAP System via oData Service through ABAP Program
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have requirement to read the txt file contents and send the same via OData service which should be called with payload via https to the endpoint. The same should be triggered within an ABAP Program.

Any help/pointers if someone has knowledge on this subject ?

Best Regards,

Navin

entry.title: Re: About users with profile SAP_ALL
entry.content:
Dear Sandra_Rossi

Not assigned to all users. Assigned only to a limited number of users.
Should users with profile SAP_ALL be zero?
We would appreciate it if you could also answer questions 2 and 3.
